evals.prompt: Search the NLB Singapore catalog for books about Singapore history published after 2010. I want to see titles, authors, and publication dates.
evals.expected_output: NLB catalog search results for Singapore history with post-2010 date filter
expectations: The NLB Catalogue API was called (openweb.nlb.gov.sg)
Authentication headers X-API-KEY and X-APP-Code were included
Keywords 'singapore history' were used in the search
Date filter was applied (DateFrom=2010 or similar)
Multiple results are listed with titles, authors, and dates

evals.prompt: I have ISBN 9789814385169. Can you look it up in the NLB catalog and check if it's available at any library branch?
evals.expected_output: NLB title details and availability info for ISBN 9789814385169
expectations: GetTitleDetails or GetTitles was called with the ISBN
The title is identified with author and publication info
GetAvailabilityInfo was called to check branch availability
Library locations and availability status are shown
BRN is extracted from the result

evals.prompt: Search NLB for Chinese-language books about the Dream of the Red Chamber (红楼梦). Show me what they have.
evals.expected_output: NLB search results for Dream of the Red Chamber in Chinese
expectations: NLB was searched with relevant Chinese or English title terms
Language filter for Chinese was applied if available
Results include titles with native title fields (nativeTitle)
Multiple editions or copies are listed
